problem id: c7660833
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  10011011 -> 10101011
  01111011 -> 10110111
  00001010 -> 00010001
  10011000 -> 11010011
  01000010 -> 01011000
  10001000 -> 01010001
  00010110 -> 01110010
  10110111 -> 01001110

query: 00000010
predicted answer: 01010000
